name: MultiLegRobotWithIK
description: Inverse kinematics and gait control for walking robots with 4 or more 3-DOF legs. Each leg is an independent object with its own geometry and mounting angle, so symmetric and asymmetric layouts (quadruped, pentapod, hexapod, octopod, ...) work without special-case code.
keywords: robot, walking-robot, hexapod, pentapod, quadruped, octopod, inverse-kinematics, gait, servo, esp32
